successCriteria: Self-handoff survival is verified after readiness before the old watcher exits.
The old watcher only exits after the new watcher PID is alive, the active lock points to the new PID/version, and the heartbeat advances.
A duplicate watcher readiness file is not accepted as durable handoff confirmation.
Direct handoff uses the validated ZIP folder name under D:\Work, matching the last known-good v4.13 folder behavior.
Direct handoff starts background npm and Playwright installation after watcher readiness, matching the last known-good v4.13 startup separation.
If handoff survival fails, the old watcher remains alive and continues watching Downloads.
Startup self-handoff probe is disabled by default and must not block watcher startup.
Executable self-handoff lifecycle probe runs during LaunchCheck candidate validation, not as a blocking startup task.
The watcher uses a polling scanner plus fs.watch assist so Windows file event misses do not strand post-handoff validation.
Polling seeds existing Downloads files on startup so backlog remains ignored unless --scan-existing is supplied.
The self-handoff probe has a bounded timeout and reports phase details instead of hanging indefinitely.
The promoted watcher must validate a post-handoff smoke ZIP before the self-handoff lifecycle probe passes.
